changelog: v1.5.27: Crash logging wired to all threads + antivirus file-access check on startup
changes: FIX: sys.excepthook + threading.excepthook route ALL unhandled exceptions to crashes.jsonl
FIX: Startup file-access check catches antivirus quarantine before Flask starts
FIX: _diagnose_crash recognises Windows access-denied / CyberCapture error pattern
FIX: launch.py version string updated (was stale at 1.5.18)
